- & = conjunction (and) 
- | = disjunction (or) 
- ~ = negation (not) 
- -> = implication (implies)

    Ax represents ∀x  
    Ex represents ∃x

Variables: first letter in lowercase, can be followed by letters and numbers (e.g., x, x0, xP0).
